raw_text: {"intent":"extract_atomic_memory_cards","decision":"commit_success","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam prefers Bill Evans.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Bill Evans","type":"person_or_artist","role":"preference"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"prefers","object":"Bill Evans"}]},{"kind":"preference","statement":"Daniele prefers knowledge graphs.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Daniele","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Knowledge graphs","type":"topic","role":"preference"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Daniele","predicate":"prefers","object":"Knowledge graphs"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No prior entity context was provided; names are preserved as given."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"Extracted two atomic preference memory cards from the table.","citations":["| Sam | Bill Evans |","| Daniele | Knowledge graphs |"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Committed preference card for Sam.","Committed preference card for Daniele."]}}
